globalOptions.name: --version
globalOptions.description: print version number, then turn on inspect mode

globalOptions.name: --help
globalOptions.description: show this message, -h for short message

globalOptions.name: -e
globalOptions.description: one line of script. Several -e's allowed. Omit [programfile]

globalOptions.name: -r
globalOptions.description: require the library before executing your script

globalOptions.name: -I
globalOptions.description: specify $LOAD_PATH directory (may be used more than once)

globalOptions.name: -w
globalOptions.description: turn warnings on for your script
specify record separator (\0, if no argument)

globalOptions.name: -E
globalOptions.description: specify the default external and internal character encodings

globalOptions.name: -U
globalOptions.description: set default internal encoding to UTF-8
